title: vercel-labs/skills
friendlyTitle: Vercel Skills: reusable instructions for AI coding agents
summary: Vercel Labs’ Skills project provides a CLI and open ecosystem for discovering, installing, creating, and using reusable agent skills across coding assistants such as Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and others.
friendlySummary: This project helps people install and share reusable “skills” for AI coding tools. A skill is a saved set of instructions or workflow steps.
whyItMatters: Teams can package repeatable instructions, workflows, and conventions as portable skills, then reuse them across agents and projects instead of rewriting prompts from scratch.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to make your AI assistant follow the same project rules, review habits, or team workflows every time.
